Kadir Has University

Industrial Design

Kadir Has University Department of Industrial Design aims to train professionals who develop creative and innovative solutions by integrating the design process with aesthetics, ergonomics, material knowledge and environmental factors. The education focuses on practical experiences in the field, company collaborations and project-based studies. The department also attaches importance to international co-operation by making an Erasmus agreement with Design Academy Eindhoven.
